name: TitleMax Title Pawns
description_short: At 2052 S Cobb Dr SE in Marietta, GA, TitleMax Title Pawns provides quick title loans and pawn services.
description_long:
TitleMax Title Pawns operates at 2052 S Cobb Dr SE in Marietta, GA, in a standalone location easily accessible from Route 41. The store is open weekdays from 10 AM to 7 PM, Saturday from 10 AM to 4 PM, and closed Sundays. This Marietta location serves South Cobb County residents seeking quick title-secured loans and pawn services.

At this Marietta, GA location, customers can get title loans secured by vehicle ownership documents, as well as traditional pawn services on valuables like jewelry, electronics, and collectibles. The staff can discuss your options over the phone at 770-434-9701 or in person at the store during business hours.

If you live or work in Marietta and need quick cash without a credit check, bring a valid ID and your vehicle's title (if applying for a title loan) to the S Cobb Dr location. TitleMax Title Pawns has served South Cobb for years with straightforward pawn and title loan services.
address: 2052 S Cobb Dr SE, Marietta, GA 30060

pricing.guarantee_details: No money-back guarantee applies — this is a lending and pawn product, not a subscription service.

pros: Founded in 1998 with 25+ years of title lending experience and 900–1,100+ locations nationwide
No credit check or minimum credit score required — bad credit and no credit accepted
No bank account required to qualify for a title pawn or loan
Vehicle stays in the customer's possession while the title is held as collateral
Cash disbursement in as little as 30 minutes at in-store locations
Mobile app (iOS and Android, 500,000+ Android downloads) supports payments, balance checks, and payment history
Marietta location holds a 5.0/5 Google rating from 637 reviews
cons: Interest rates up to 25% per month, with effective APRs commonly ranging from 119% to 300%+ annually
CFPB enforcement action in 2023 resulted in a $10 million penalty for unlawful lending practices and overcharging military families
Operates under Georgia pawn shop statutes at this location, providing fewer consumer protections than standard lending laws
Not BBB accredited; consumer review platforms show approximately 2.0/5 stars with high complaint volumes
Defaulting borrowers risk losing their vehicle title and ultimately their vehicle
best_for: Vehicle owners with a free-and-clear title who need fast emergency cash and have no viable lower-cost alternative
Borrowers with bad credit or no credit history who cannot qualify for traditional bank loans or credit cards
Consumers without a bank account who need immediate in-store cash access
Georgia residents already familiar with pawn-statute-based title products and their legal framework
diagnosis: TitleMax is genuinely accessible to consumers with no credit, bad credit, or no bank account who own a vehicle outright and need cash quickly — the 30-minute funding and no-credit-check model fills a real gap that banks do not serve. However, with APRs frequently exceeding 200%, a 2023 CFPB enforcement action on record, and pawn-statute classification in Georgia that reduces borrower protections, this is a high-cost last-resort product that can compound rapidly for borrowers who cannot repay within the first billing cycle.
services: Car Title Pawns (Georgia pawn statute, title held as collateral)
Car Title Loans (traditional loan structure, select states)
Lines of Credit (unsecured, select states only)
In-store cash disbursement (funds in as little as 30 minutes)
Online customer account portal (balance, payment history, due dates)
Mobile app for iOS and Android (payments, balance checks, store locator)
Store-based loan servicing and account management
meta_description: Marietta, GA's TitleMax Title Pawns at 2052 S Cobb Dr SE. Fast title loans and pawn services, no credit check required.
